memoryArtifacts.headline: The Visitation of Yorkshire Norton Ancient pedigree chart; page 231
Grave Memorial
memoryArtifacts.description:
Knight of Norton Conyers, Appleton by Hackforth, Nunwick, Yorkshire. Sheriff of Yorkshire.

Son and heir to Sir John Norton and Joan Pigot. He was the husband of Margaret Warde, daughter of Sir Roger …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Norton於1458年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾諾頓 康聶爾斯時，他的父親Sir John Norton31歲，母親Lady Joan Pigot27歲。他於1474年與Margaret Warde在英國越可爾沃斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1520年8月28日在英國越可爾沃斯享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Norton于1458年出生在英国英格兰越可爾諾頓 康聶爾斯时，他的父亲Sir John Norton31岁，母亲Lady Joan Pigot27岁。他于1474年与Margaret Warde在英国越可爾沃斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1520年8月28日在英国越可爾沃斯享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: Norton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the many places so called, from Old English north ‘north’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’. In some cases it is a variant of Norrington .
Irish: altered form of   Naughton  , assimilated to the English name (see 1 above).
Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of some similar (like-sounding) original Ashkenazic surname.

variants.name: Norrington
meanings: (southeastern): from Norringtonend in Redbourn (Hertforshire), Northingtown Farm in Grimley (Worcestershire), or Norrington in Alvediston (Wiltshire). All three names are from Old English north in tūne ‘to the north of the village’.
possibly a variant of Northampton, a habitational name from the city of this name, which was named with Old English north ‘north’ + hām + tūn ‘homestead, home farm’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Norton was born in 1458, in Norton Conyers, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John Norton, was 31 and his mother, Lady Joan Pigot, was 27. He married Margaret Warde in 1474, in Wath, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 28 August 1520, in Wath, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Norton est né en 1458, à Norton Conyers, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Norton, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Lady Joan Pigot, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Warde en 1474, à Wath, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 28 août 1520, à Wath, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Norton 1458 in Norton Conyers, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Norton 31 und seine Mutter Lady Joan Pigot 27. Er hat 1474 in Wath, Yorkshire, England Margaret Warde geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 28. August 1520 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Wath, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Norton è nato il nel 1458 nel Norton Conyers, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir John Norton, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Lady Joan Pigot, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Warde nel 1474, nel Wath, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 28 agosto 1520, nel Wath, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Nortonが1458年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアノートン コニーエルズで生まれた時，父Sir John Nortonは31歳，母Lady Joan Pigotは27歳であった。1474年にイギリスヨークシュアイアワスでMargaret Wardeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1520年8月28日にイギリスヨークシュアイアワスで62歳で死去した。

ko.Sharpenhoe, Streatley with Sharpenhoe, B: 영국 베드퍼드실르 스트리틀리 위스 샤르펜호 샤르펜호

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Norton(이)가 1458년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 노르턴 코니어스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Norton(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Joan Pigot(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1474년 영국 요르크실르 왓h에서 Margaret Warde(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1520년 8월 28일 영국 요르크실르 왓h에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Norton nasceu em 1458, em Norton Conyers, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Norton, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Lady Joan Pigot, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Warde em 1474, em Wath, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 28 de agosto de 1520, em Wath, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Norton родился в 1458 г. в местности нортон кониирс, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John Norton было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Joan Pigot, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Warde в 1474 г. в местности ват, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 28 августа 1520 г. в местности ват, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 62 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Norton nació en 1458, en Norton Conyers, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John Norton, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Lady Joan Pigot, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Margaret Warde en 1474, en Wath, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 28 de agosto de 1520, en Wath, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 62 años.
